name: io.qent.broxy/graphlit
title: Graphlit
description: Knowledge ingestion and retrieval platform for multi-source content pipelines and AI applications.

environmentVariables.description: Your JWT secret for signing the JWT token
environmentVariables.name: GRAPHLIT_JWT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Slack bot token for Slack integration
environmentVariables.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Discord bot token for Discord integration
environmentVariables.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Google refresh token for Gmail integration
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_EMAIL_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Google client ID for Gmail integration
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_EMAIL_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Google client secret for Gmail integration
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_EMAIL_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Linear API key for Linear integration
environmentVariables.name: LINEAR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Notion API key for Notion integration
environmentVariables.name: NOTION_API_KEY
